title: Box Function
parameters:
AreaNumber	The AreaNumber of the box to check definition of.

robotNumber	Optional.  Integer expression that specifies which robot you want to configure.
If omitted, the current robot number is used.

limit	Integer expression that specifies which limit to return.

1:  Lower Limit

2: Upper Limit

When you select 1 for limit, the point contains the lower limit of the X, Y, Z coordinates.

When you select 2 for limit, the point contains the upper limit of the X, Y, Z coordinates.
description: The BoxDef function is used to check if a box has been defined.
see_also:
Returns the specified approach check area.

Box

BoxClr

BoxDef

GetRobotInsideBox

InsideBox

Box Function Example

P1 = Box(1,1)

P2 = Box(1,2)
